runtime_impact: Architectural restructure of the LENS V2 representation system. Adds SEMANTIC_ACTORS registry (15 actors) and LENS_MODE_SEMANTICS map. All four mode canvases rewritten to compose distinct actor subsets — no shared dominant content. Propagation Structure Zone demoted to a thin selected-path strip. EvidenceDepthLayer gated to INVESTIGATION mode only. BOARDROOM ring rebuilt as a Confidence Envelope (conic-gradient with grounded/advisory arcs). Comprehensive new CSS for the actor panel system. No new dependencies. No new API endpoints. No new routes. Route compiles and renders cleanly at HTTP 200 across all four lenses. Mode differentiation passes the five-second material test for all four switches.
notes: Single source-file change. Adds 15-actor registry + 4 rewritten mode canvases + thin topology strip + ~40 new actor CSS classes + Confidence Envelope ring CSS. Removes prior weighted-node Propagation Structure rendering and prior triadic per-mode rep field rendering. 8 Playwright screenshots produced as visual evidence. Static report artifacts continue as named references only — no HTML body inlined. Future client/run binding still pending; documented in VAULT_TO_SEMANTIC_CANVAS_MODEL.md.
